action.reasoning: Observation: Sign test confirms ang_vel = -2*angle is correct (angle decreases toward 0). Robot closes ~1.3m in 50 steps. But eval shows only 32 safe_follow_steps avg. Episodes end early (many at 200-400 steps) likely due to collisions. Analysis: The controller logic is correct but the robot loses the human when it turns corners. Need to be more aggressive at pursuit and avoid getting stuck. Also, the safe_follow_steps from stats may not match my counting - need to use the actual metric. Decision: Final attempt - make controller more aggressive, increase angular gain, reduce backing up, submit eval with 2 iterations remaining.
